title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入马达加斯加：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入馬達加斯加：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Madagascar BNM conformity assessment requirements, ORE electricity regulatory licensing, JIRAMA grid-connection requirements, ADER off-grid electrification standards (IEC TS 62257, VeraSol), IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international safety standards, UN 38.3 transport requirements, and Madagascar's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与马达加斯加BNM合格评定要求、ORE电力监管许可、JIRAMA并网要求、ADER离网电气化标准（IEC TS 62257、VeraSol）、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际安全标准、UN 38.3运输要求及马达加斯加220/380 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023及NB/T 42090-2016基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與馬達加斯加BNM合格評定要求、ORE電力監管許可、JIRAMA併網要求、ADER離網電氣化標準（IEC TS 62257、VeraSol）、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際安全標準、UN 38.3運輸要求及馬達加斯加220/380 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023及NB/T 42090-2016基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BNM conformity scope determination, ORE licensing approval, JIRAMA grid-connection approval, ADER rural electrification approval, VeraSol quality certification, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Madagascar BNM Technical Regulations, ORE licensing requirements, JIRAMA grid-connection technical specifications, ADER and donor/lender procurement standards, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BNM合格评定范围裁定、ORE许可审批、JIRAMA并网批准、ADER农村电气化审批、VeraSol质量认证、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行马达加斯加BNM技术法规、ORE许可要求、JIRAMA并网技术规格、ADER及捐助方/贷款方采购标准、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BNM合格評定範圍裁定、ORE許可審批、JIRAMA併網批准、ADER農村電氣化審批、VeraSol質量認證、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬達加斯加BNM技術法規、ORE許可要求、JIRAMA併網技術規格、ADER及捐助方/貸款方採購標準、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Madagascar does not yet have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a SABER/IEC 62619 route or the EU Battery Regulation. BESS projects in Madagascar operate primarily under project-specific international standards referenced by the electricity regulator ORE, the national utility JIRAMA, donor and lender procurement requirements (World Bank, AfDB), and off-grid quality frameworks (IEC TS 62257, VeraSol). The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Madagascar are: (1) BNM conformity assessment — BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) adopts IEC standards and may require conformity evidence for electrical equipment; (2) ORE licensing — grid-connected BESS projects require an ORE electricity generation or storage licence; (3) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the internationally expected baseline for project acceptance by donor-financed IPPs and JIRAMA; (4) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in JIRAMA or project-owner specifications; (5) ADER and VeraSol quality standards for off-grid and solar mini-grid BESS applications, which reference IEC TS 62257 and VeraSol test protocols; (6) UN 38.3 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions for import through the main port of Toamasina (Tamatave); and (7) 50 Hz grid configuration — Madagascar's grid operates at 220/380 V 50 Hz, nominally the same as China's 220/380 V system, reducing voltage reconfiguration risk but not eliminating the need for JIRAMA connection testing. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in project, donor, or regulatory review in Madagascar.
answer_first.zh: 马达加斯加尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与SABER/IEC 62619路径或欧盟《电池法规》相当。马达加斯加的BESS项目主要依据电力监管机构ORE、国家电力公司JIRAMA、捐助方和贷款方采购要求（世界银行、非洲开发银行）以及离网质量框架（IEC TS 62257、VeraSol）中引用的项目专属国际标准运作。中国BESS出口马达加斯加的实际差距包括：（1）BNM合格评定——马达加斯加标准局（BNM）采用IEC标准，可能要求电气设备合格证据；（2）ORE许可——并网BESS项目须取得ORE电力发电或储能许可；（3）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为捐助融资IPP和JIRAMA项目验收的国际预期基准；（4）JIRAMA或项目业主规格中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（5）离网和太阳能微电网BESS应用的ADER和VeraSol质量标准，引用IEC TS 62257和VeraSol测试协议；（6）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3运输测试文件，适用于经主要港口塔马塔夫（Toamasina）进口；（7）50 Hz电网配置——马达加斯加电网运行参数为220/380 V 50 Hz，名义上与中国220/380 V系统相同，降低了电压重新配置风险，但不能省去JIRAMA并网测试。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是生产基准，但在马达加斯加的项目、捐助方或监管审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 馬達加斯加尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與SABER/IEC 62619路徑或歐盟《電池法規》相當。馬達加斯加的BESS項目主要依據電力監管機構ORE、國家電力公司JIRAMA、捐助方和貸款方採購要求（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行）以及離網質量框架（IEC TS 62257、VeraSol）中引用的項目專屬國際標準運作。中國BESS出口馬達加斯加的實際差距包括：（1）BNM合格評定——馬達加斯加標準局（BNM）採用IEC標準，可能要求電氣設備合格證據；（2）ORE許可——併網BESS項目須取得ORE電力發電或儲能許可；（3）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為捐助融資IPP和JIRAMA項目驗收的國際預期基準；（4）JIRAMA或項目業主規格中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（5）離網和太陽能微電網BESS應用的ADER和VeraSol質量標準，引用IEC TS 62257和VeraSol測試協議；（6）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3運輸測試文件，適用於經主要港口塔馬塔夫（Toamasina）進口；（7）50 Hz電網配置——馬達加斯加電網運行參數為220/380 V 50 Hz，名義上與中國220/380 V系統相同，降低了電壓重新配置風險，但不能省去JIRAMA併網測試。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016是製造基準，但在馬達加斯加的項目、捐助方或監管審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
